1.description: Fetch Lillestrøm municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard areas (polygons) for Lillestrøm municipality

3.description: Fetch parcels (teig) intersecting quick-clay hazard areas in Lillestrøm

4.description: Fetch 1 km grid cells covering Lillestrøm municipality

5.description: Spatial join: parcels (from step 3) within grid cells (from step 4)

7.description: Sort grid cells by parcel count descending

replan_trigger.error: Step 3 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

args.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    LOWER(kommunenavn_norsk) = 'lillestrøm';

SELECT
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(t.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig t,
    kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr k
WHERE
    t.kommunenummer = '3205'
    AND ST_Intersects(t.omrade, k.omrade);

3.sql:
SELECT
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(t.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig t
WHERE
    t.kommunenummer = '3205'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM (
            SELECT omrade
            FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr
            WHERE ST_Intersects(
                omrade,
                ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"MultiPolygon","coordinates":[[[[11.05,59.95],[11.05,60.1],[11.3,60.1],[11.3,59.95],[11.05,59.95]]]]}'), 4326), 25833)
            )
        ) k
        WHERE ST_Intersects(t.omrade, k.omrade)
    );
